page.title: Advanced Gerund and Infinitive Patterns
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Gerund and Infinitive Patterns — B2 gerund and infinitive choices after verbs, adjectives, prepositions, and meaning-changing verbs.
page.subtitle_text: B2 gerund and infinitive choices after verbs, adjectives, prepositions, and meaning-changing verbs.

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Advanced Gerund and Infinitive Patterns: Advanced Gerund and Infinitive Patterns focuses on B2 verb patterns where -ing and to-infinitive choices affect structure or meaning.","rules":[{"label":"Verb pattern","text":"Learn the verb together with the form that follows it.","example":"avoid doing / decide to do"},{"label":"Meaning change","text":"Some verbs change meaning with gerund or infinitive.","example":"remember locking / remember to lock"},{"label":"After prepositions","text":"After prepositions, use a gerund form.","example":"interested in learning"}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
